titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ قَالَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – The who says, ‘There is no God except Allahazwj, and Allahazwj is the Greatest

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ قَالَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – The who says, ‘There is no God except Allahazwj, and Allahazwj is the Greatest

segments: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
arabic.text:
ثَمَنُ الْجَنَّةِ.

لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, raising it, from Hareyz, from Yaqoub Al Qummy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The price of the Paradise is (saying of),
‘There is no god except Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is the Greatest’’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, raising it, from Hareyz, from Yaqoub Al Qummy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The price of the Paradise is (saying of),

‘There is no god except Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is the Greatest’’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa in a marfu ’ manner from Hariz from Ya’qub al-Qummi from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The cost of paradise is (sincerely) saying: ‘No one deserves to be worshipped except Allah and Allah is greater than everyones’ description.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa in a marfu ’ manner from Hariz from Ya’qub al-Qummi from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The cost of paradise is (sincerely) saying: ‘No one deserves to be worshipped except Allah and Allah is greater than everyones’ description.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/200)
gradings.label: مرفوع
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/200)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى رَفَعَهُ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ الْقُمِّيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
